The Author

Jayant

Jayant writes stories that sit in the space between what's said and what's felt — gothic worlds, quiet heartbreaks, and characters who carry more than they show. Between Shadow and Silence and The Crow, Blood Tears are his first two titles under Midnight Binding.

MIDNIGHT BINDING

Every copy, ebook or otherwise, is bound for someone who needed it.
